general.title: General settings
general.subtitle: Manage your overall preferences in the app.

version.title: Version
version.downloadDescription: latest version to get new features and improvements.

autoCheckUpdates.label: Automatic check for updates
autoCheckUpdates.description: App will periodically check for updates and notify if new version is available.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: System notifications will be used only for reminders. When disabled, reminders will appear only in app notifications list.

lockOnSystemLock.label: Lock vault when system locks
lockOnSystemLock.description: Vault will be locked when a screen saver starts, or a device sleeps.

lockAfterIdle.title: Lock vault after idle
lockAfterIdle.description: Vault will be locked after selected idle time.

accentColor.title: Accent color
accentColor.zenNotApplicable: Accent color is not applicable to selected theme.

zoomLevel.title: Zoom level
zoomLevel.description:
Adjust the default zoom level for all windows.
In case your system does not scale apps automatically, you may change the zoom to make it fit the actual display pixel ratio (DPR). Detected DPR is {{dpr}}.

errors.enterNumber: Enter a number to set zoom

fontFamily.title: Font family
fontFamily.description: Set a font family to use in all editors, or leave empty to use defaults.

dateFormat.title: Date format
dateFormat.description: Set the date format used when inserting dates. Supports standard token syntax like DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm:ss.

shortcuts.toggleArchive: Move active note in/out of archive
shortcuts.toggleBookmark: Move active note in/out of bookmark
shortcuts.toggleHistory: Show or hide history of active note

rememberPasswords.label: Remember workspaces passwords
rememberPasswords.description: Workspaces passwords will be encrypted with master key and saved in database, to automatically open encrypted workspaces without entering a password.

deleteOrphaned.label: Delete orphaned files
deleteOrphaned.description: Delete files that are not used anymore.

enable.label: Enable synchronization
enable.description: Keep your vault in sync across devices. All data is encrypted before it leaves your device.

record.label: Record note snapshots
record.description: When enabled, snapshots of note content will be created when a note is changed. You may control snapshot recording per note in the note history panel.

delay.title: Delay for snapshot
delay.description: How long to wait after a note is edited before saving a new snapshot, in seconds. Shorter intervals mean more frequent snapshots — and a larger vault.

moveToBin.label: Move notes to bin
moveToBin.description: Move notes to a trash bin instead of permanent deletion so you can restore them later.

autoPurge.label: Permanently delete old notes in bin
autoPurge.description: Notes moved to bin will be permanently deleted after some time.

purgeDelay.title: Permanent deletion delay
purgeDelay.description: Notes in the bin will be permanently deleted after this many days, counted from when they were moved there.

newNoteTitle.title: New note title
newNoteTitle.description: Set title for new notes. You may use date via syntax {date} or {date:FORMAT} like {date:DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm}.

delete.label: Delete workspace and all related data, including notes, tags and files
delete.cannotDeleteLast: Cannot delete the last workspace in a vault.

dangerousZone.confirmDelete:
You are about to delete workspace "{{name}}". Are you sure you want to do it?

If you continue, all data related to this workspace will be deleted, including notes, tags and files.

dropzone.title: Drop Markdown files or .zip archive to import
dropzone.description: Drag & Drop some files here, or click to select files

importExport.progress: Notes import is in progress. Stage: {{stage}} {{processed}}/{{total}}
